message:
Running command: NIX_PYTHONPREFIX=/nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env \
    NIX_PYTHONEXECUTABLE=/nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/bin/python3.11 \
    NIX_PYTHONPATH=/nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages \
    PYTHONNOUSERSITE=true \
    /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/bin/python3.11 - << 'PYEOF'
import ciel

home = ciel.get_ciel_home('/nc/pdk')
print('CIEL home:', home)

# Check what versions are installed
try:
    installed = ciel.list_installed(home, 'sky130')
    print('Installed sky130 versions:', installed)
except Exception as e:
    print('list_installed error:', e)

# Try fetch with the target revision
try:
    from ciel.source import StaticWebDataSource
    version = ciel.fetch(
        home, 'sky130', '0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af',
        data_source=StaticWebDataSource('https://fossi-foundation.github.io/ciel-releases'),
        include_libraries=['default']
    )
    print('Fetched version dir:', version.get_dir(home))
except Exception as e:
    print('fetch error:', e)
PYEOF

import ciel

home = ciel.get_ciel_home('/nc/pdk')
print('CIEL home:', home)

# Check what versions are installed
try:
    installed = ciel.list_installed(home, 'sky130')
    print('Installed sky130 versions:', installed)
except Exception as e:
    print('list_installed error:', e)

# Try fetch with the target revision
try:
    from ciel.source import StaticWebDataSource
    version = ciel.fetch(
        home, 'sky130', '0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af',
        data_source=StaticWebDataSource('https://fossi-foundation.github.io/ciel-releases'),
        include_libraries=['default']
    )
    print('Fetched version dir:', version.get_dir(home))
except Exception as e:
    print('fetch error:', e)
